race.comment: HERE THE CROWD (10) has been plying her trade in harder Victorian contests and should find this contest easier than recent efforts. Has placed six of seven over this journey and gets the services of Maloney in the saddle. Sure to feature prominently. TOPHET (6) opened the campaign with consecutive victories and has been thereabouts in two subsequent runs since. Top-three contender on best figures. COOL PANELS (7) is an honest campaigner who is usually thereabouts. One for the exotics players. TRAPEDO (12) rounds out the selections in an open race to close out the card. Resuming from a break and can give this a shake fresh.
